strengths: Strong analytics toolset (Tableau, Power BI, GA)
Hands-on SQL and Python ETL experience
Quantified impact on KPI visibility and acquisition
Experience with customer segmentation and cohort analysis
weaknesses: SEO analytics and product performance examples missing
improvement_bullets: Integrated Google BigQuery and Snowflake environments to perform advanced product performance analysis, identifying top-performing SKUs and optimizing inventory replenishment cycles.

Conducted full-funnel A/B and multivariate testing on marketing assets to optimize conversion rates and return on ad spend (ROAS), consistently driving measurable improvements in campaign effectiveness.
Utilized SEO analytics to monitor site performance, implementing keyword tagging and tracking strategies that improved visibility and organic traffic to digital platforms.
Optimized sales performance by conducting deep-dive cohort analysis and product performance reviews, directly informing tactical commercial activations and pricing strategies.
Engineered robust data pipelines in SQL and Python to extract, transform, and load (ETL) large-scale retail datasets, supporting real-time ROI measurement and executive reporting.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Commercial Business Analyst opportunity with H&M. I am interested in this opportunity because of H&M's commitment to fashion-forward retail and its global footprint in the evolving e-commerce landscape. What interests me about working for H&M is its values-driven culture and its unique focus on sustainability and inclusive growth; this inspires me because I am passionate about leveraging data to create equitable and personalized shopping experiences for diverse customer bases. I believe my expertise in data-driven commercial strategy and my proficiency in advanced visualization tools would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by translating complex datasets into actionable insights that drive revenue. In fact, while at Shine Masters, I developed a series of time-series models and customer segments that informed new marketing initiatives, which contributed to a 300% increase in customer acquisition over 12 months. Ultimately, I know that the Commercial Business Analyst role at H&M would allow me to bring my analytical rigor to support sales and marketing performance. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst at Shine Masters enabled me to develop my A/B testing and performance reporting skills. I led the transition to automated Power BI dashboards that reduced data processing time by 40% and directly improved KPI visibility for executive leadership. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my background in Python and SQL to work on full-funnel web performance and conversion attribution at H&M. I know that my expertise in customer segmentation and dashboarding aligns with what it takes to succeed at the Commercial Business Analyst role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
